acceptance_criteria: Repair attempts strictly limited to one.
prd_refs: PRD §6.5 Model request contract — hard requirements (lines 575-583)
description: Parse model output as strict JSON. If parsing fails, perform exactly one repair attempt — invoke the model again with the malformed output and a "fix to valid JSON only" instruction. If the second attempt also fails, return a structured failure and refuse to execute.
notes: Be defensive about model output containing leading/trailing whitespace or BOM — strip before parsing, but do not strip aggressively (whitespace inside strings is valid JSON).
steps: TDD: Valid JSON parses without invoking the model.
TDD: Markdown-fenced JSON is unwrapped or rejected (one repair attempt).
TDD: Invalid JSON triggers exactly one repair attempt.
TDD: Missing required schema fields (`command` for v0.1) → fail-closed.
Author `Private/Model/Repair-ModelJson.ps1` taking `(RawOutput, RepairFn)` where `RepairFn` is an injectable lambda that invokes `Invoke-OllamaChat` so tests can mock it.
Tests provide canned malformed strings and assert the repair path is hit at most once.
name: [mdl-04] Strict JSON parsing with one repair attempt
